description_long: This is a rustic, barrel-shaped wooden cup with two wide, dark metal bands encircling its upper and lower sections, giving it a sturdy and old-fashioned appearance. The wood grain is clearly visible, adding a natural and handcrafted feel to the object. A thick, rounded wooden handle is attached vertically to one side, seamlessly integrated into the cup's body for a comfortable grip. The interior is also wooden, matching the exterior's warm brown tones. The metal bands provide both structural reinforcement and a visual contrast to the wood. This cup evokes the style of traditional tavern or medieval drinkware, suitable for serving beverages in urban settings such as themed cafes, parks, or street festivals.
description: A barrel-shaped wooden cup with dark metal bands and a thick wooden handle, featuring a rustic, handcrafted look. The wood grain and metal accents give it a sturdy, old-fashioned appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle centered and both metal bands clearly visible, emphasizing the cup's symmetry and robust construction.
description_view_1: Side view with the handle extending to the left, revealing the curvature and attachment of the handle to the cup's body.
description_view_2: Rear view with no handle visible, displaying the uninterrupted wood and metal banding around the cup.
description_view_3: Side view with the handle extending to the right, similar to view 1 but mirrored, showing the handle's integration with the cup.
